page.content: Additionally, the Marine segment has shown a CededPremiums value of £20M and a CessionPercentage of 50.0%, highlighting its reliance on reinsurance to mitigate potential losses, with a commentary value of £15M reflecting its operational dynamics. Liquidity considerations are also critical, with Stocks categorized as having Moderate liquidity and Bonds classified as High. Furthermore, the solvency analysis indicates that the Tier1Capital for the period 2024Q2 remains consistent at 2024Q2, alongside TotalLiabilities amounting to £25M.
